listings.title: Senior Cat Kidney Support Powder
listings.description: Specially formulated to support kidney health in aging cats, this premium powder blend contains essential nutrients and antioxidants that promote optimal renal function. Easy to mix with wet food, it helps maintain your senior cat's quality of life during their golden years.

seo.title: Senior Cat Kidney Support Powder | PawVital SA
seo.description: Premium kidney support powder for aging cats. Natural formula promotes renal health and wellness in senior felines.

listings.title: Senior Dog Joint Support Supplement
listings.description: Give your senior dog the mobility and comfort they deserve with this advanced joint support formula featuring glucosamine, chondroitin, and natural anti-inflammatory ingredients. Scientifically formulated to reduce stiffness and promote active aging in dogs over 7 years old.

seo.title: Senior Dog Joint Support Supplement | PawVital SA
seo.description: Joint support for aging dogs. Glucosamine formula reduces stiffness and supports mobility in senior pets.

listings.title: Pet Anxiety Calming CBD Oil Drops
listings.description: Premium locally-sourced CBD oil specifically designed to soothe anxiety and stress in dogs and cats during challenging situations. Our easy-to-administer drops provide natural calming support without sedation, helping your pet feel relaxed and safe.

seo.title: Pet Anxiety Calming CBD Oil Drops | PawVital SA
seo.description: Natural CBD oil drops for anxious dogs and cats. Local SA-made formula for stress and anxiety relief.
